message:
test(ssh): expand session event debug tests + fix screen reflow borrow

ssh/session.rs (+66 lines):
- Add 6 new tests exercising Debug formatting for all SessionEvent
  variants: dead_session_source_is_none, host_verify, authenticate,
  host_verification_failed, exec, and signal_channel
- Ensures Debug output includes key fields (usernames, addresses,
  command lines) for structured log readability

term/screen.rs (+3/-1):
- Fix borrow checker issue in parallel reflow batch processing: bind
  `&logical_lines[start..end]` to a local `logical_slice` before the
  `scope.spawn(move |_| ...)` closure, avoiding a partial borrow of
  the logical_lines slice across the move boundary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
